chapter_title.ar: باب فِيمَا يُصَابُ مِنَ الْبَهَائِمِ وَ غَيْرِهَا مِنَ الدَّوَابِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – Regarding what is hit from the cattle and others from the animals

text: هُ قَالَ دِيَةُ الْكَلْبِ السَّلُوقِيِّ أَرْبَعُونَ دِرْهَماً جَعَلَ ذَلِكَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ دِيَةُ كَلْبِ الْغَنَمِ كَبْشٌ وَ دِيَةُ كَلْبِ الزَّرْعِ جَرِيبٌ مِنْ بُرٍّ وَ دِيَةُ كَلْبِ الْأَهْلِيِّ قَفِيزٌ مِنْ تُرَابٍ لِأَهْلِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Hafs, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws) having said: ‘Wergild of the greyhound dog is forty Dirhams, Rasool-Allahsaww made it to be that, and wergild of the shepherd dog, and the wergild of the plantation guard dog being a ‘Jareyb’ (unit of measurement) from the wheat; and wergild of domesticated dog being a ‘Qafeez’ (Unit of measurement) from the soil of its owners’.
